messages.author: Codes
messages.text: Yo, there are a number of us building out the twin cities MeshCore network. Some of us hang out in the MSPMesh discord at https://mspmesh.org/chat , getting information about how to build good repeaters for the cold. We also have https://msp.meshmapper.net setup to understand coverage as we build out. Come join us! (edited)
messages.content_html: Yo, there are a number of us building out the twin cities MeshCore network. Some of us hang out in the MSPMesh discord at https://mspmesh.org/chat, getting information about how to build good repeaters for the cold. We also have https://msp.meshmapper.net setup to understand coverage as we build out. Come join us! (edited)

Join the MSP Mesh Discord Server!

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
